transcript: Hi, sorry it’s late. It’s George Liu. I’ve got type 2 diabetes and my blood sugars have been between 15 and 18 most of this week. I haven’t changed much diet-wise, so I’m just a bit concerned and wondering if I should book in soon.

Hi, um, Mark Thompson here. I’ve had this cough for about three weeks now. No fever or anything dramatic, but it’s worse at night and keeping me awake. I’m just wondering if I should book in with Dr Shah to get it checked.

Hi, it’s Hannah Wells. Sorry to leave a message this late. I think I might have been charged twice for my last appointment. I checked my bank statement and it looks like two identical charges. I’d really appreciate it if someone could look into that.

Hi, um, Sofia Martinez here. I’ve had this cough for about three weeks now. No fever or anything dramatic, but it’s worse at night and keeping me awake. I’m just wondering if I should book in with Dr Jones to get it checked.
